title: ranunculus geraniifolius var. hornschuchii
intro: Ranunculus geraniifolius var. hornschuchii, also known as Hornschuch's ranunculus, is a variety of the Ranunculus geraniifolius plant, a type of buttercup with distinctive leaves resembling geraniums. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hornschuch's ranunculus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its availability and usage may vary due to its limited cultivation and regulatory status.
